title: The Pittsburgh Bars Most Worth Following
subtitle: By the numbers, this quarter
angle: which Pittsburgh bars and breweries are leading the social conversation. Who's getting filmed, who's posting, who's getting talked about.
intro:
Pittsburgh's bar scene has always moved by word of mouth. What this quarter's data shows is that word of mouth now has a frame rate. The bars generating the most conversation are not necessarily the ones with the most polished feeds; they are the ones people feel compelled to document.

Hidden Harbor is the clearest case. The Squirrel Hill South tiki bar pulled in roughly half a million plays from creator content this quarter, none of it landing on a brand TikTok account that actually exists. That is not a gap in the data. That is the whole story. Hop Farm Brewing Company in Lawrenceville sits in a similar position: 170,828 TikTok plays generated around a venue that has not yet built the infrastructure to catch them.

Commerce Bar and Golden Age Beer Company round out the top four on the strength of review volume and organic chatter, both still waiting for the video layer to arrive. The pattern across all four is consistent enough to call it a trend: Pittsburgh's most talked-about bars are outrunning their own social presence. Whether they close that gap by summer is the question Issue 02 will answer.

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bars, Carried By Half A Million Creator Plays With No TikTok To Catch Them.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok ground creators already own. Ten creators generated 425,844 plays this quarter on a channel Hidden Harbor doesn't have. Opening an account converts that existing interest into a followed audience.

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: Number One in Breweries, But 170,828 TikTok Plays Have Nowhere to Land.

featured_tiktok.author: stevenjamesyuhasz
featured_tiktok.caption: The staff and customer service here was unbelievable. Definitely the type of place I want to support. @B&K Farm Market #warren #youngstown #cortland #ohio

items.playbook_top_move: Give the TikTok wave a shore to hit. Claim a TikTok account and repost the top creator clips; 21 creators and 170,828 plays are already in the pipeline waiting for a destination.

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: Second In Breweries On Honest Reviews. The TikTok Layer Has Not Arrived Yet.
items.playbook_top_move: Make the taproom easy to film. Zero Pittsburgh TikTok creators are indexed here; create one visually distinct, repeatable moment inside the bar that gives a first-time creator an obvious subject.

items.name: Commerce Bar
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Bars, Built On Word Of Mouth. The Feed Has Not Caught Up.
items.playbook_top_move: Post one Reel before next weekend. Zero Reels in 30 days while the room is visually strong enough to draw out-of-state visitors; one atmospheric Reel changes the discovery calculus immediately.
